examples: And some lucky attendee will win an iPhone.
As one attendee summed up, "Where have we come from?"
"All of us together, in that beautiful place," one attendee recalls.
Side note: Each attendee here (close to 6, 000) will get the Chromebook Pixel, the high-end netbook.
Asked why, Mr. Le Meur said one attendee asked him to put it away.
